name: text-classifier
title: Text Classifier
description: Multi-class text labeling with a configurable label set. Distills a calibrated classifier whose confidence is trustworthy enough to drive an auto-route gate.
default_describe: Classify the input into exactly one of the provided labels. Output JSON: {label, confidence}. Confidence must reflect actual reliability; below 0.7, return label 'uncertain' for human review.
